text.title: Laravel Framework Fundamentals Examples
text.summary: Worked example: refactor PaymentService from facade-heavy to DI + provider.

example.context: Legacy Laravel 11 app; PaymentService uses Mail::send + Log::info + env('STRIPE_KEY') + Cache::get; tests require Mail::fake + Queue::fake.
example.walk: Step 1: define Contracts\\MailService, LoggerInterface (PSR-3), CacheService. Step 2: PaymentServiceProvider binds MailService → SendgridMailService, CacheService → RedisCacheService. Step 3: env('STRIPE_KEY') → config('stripe.key'); add config/stripe.php. Step 4: PaymentService constructor injects all three; Mail::send replaced with $this->mailService->send. Step 5: middleware EnforceTos added; route:cache + config:cache wired in deploy script.
example.output: Tests run with plain PHPUnit mocks; config:cache works; route:cache works.
